---
title: "Ian Chen Blog"
page-layout: custom
section-divs: false
toc: false
title-block-style: none
body-classes: landing-page-body
---

<div class="landing-page">

<div class="landing-intro">
<div class="landing-title">Ian Chen</div>
<div class="landing-subtitle">
這個網站記錄了我的學習與研究，並將學到的知識進一步提煉並轉化為文章，除了讓自己看見一路走來的足跡。同時也希望這個網站對路過這裡的你們來說，能有些許收穫。
</div>
</div>

```{=html}
<div class="landing-tabs">
    <button class="tab-btn active" onclick="showTab('articles', event)">近期文章</button>
    <!-- 
    <button class="tab-btn" onclick="showTab('projects', event)">近期專案</button>
    <button class="tab-btn" onclick="showTab('data', event)">開源資料</button>
    -->
</div>

<div id="tab-articles" class="tab-pane active">
    <div class="tab-cards">
        <a href="posts/台股動能策略實證 — 近高點動能/index.html" class="tab-card">
            <div class="tab-card-meta">2026-03-10</div>
            <div class="tab-card-title">台股動能策略實證 — 近高點動能</div>
            <div class="tab-card-desc">近高點動能：形成期 = 12、持有期 = 1 表現最佳，CAGR 約 21%，績效較穩、回撤較小，整體優於價格動能。</div>
            <svg class="tab-card-arrow" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"></line><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"></polyline></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="posts/台股動能策略實證 — 價格動能/index.html" class="tab-card">
            <div class="tab-card-meta">2026-03-05</div>
            <div class="tab-card-title">台股動能策略實證 — 價格動能</div>
            <div class="tab-card-desc">價格動能：形成期 = 6、持有期 = 1 最佳，CAGR 約 15.5%。績效不穩且回撤偏大，具明顯侷限。</div>
            <svg class="tab-card-arrow" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"></line><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"></polyline></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="posts/台股動能策略實證 — 框架設定/index.html" class="tab-card">
            <div class="tab-card-meta">2026-02-25</div>
            <div class="tab-card-title">台股動能策略實證 — 框架設定</div>
            <div class="tab-card-desc">建構動能策略並設定回測框架。實證顯示近高點與價格動能皆能擊敗大盤，又以近高點動能的表現較佳。</div>
            <svg class="tab-card-arrow" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"></line><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"></polyline></svg>
        </a>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- 後續擴充保留區：近期專案與開源資料
<div id="tab-projects" class="tab-pane">
    <div class="tab-cards">
        <a href="projects.html" class="tab-card">
            <div class="tab-card-meta">React + FastAPI</div>
            <div class="tab-card-title">QuantTracker</div>
            <div class="tab-card-desc">投資組合追蹤與績效歸因分析的全端應用。</div>
            <svg class="tab-card-arrow" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"></line><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"></polyline></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="projects.html" class="tab-card">
            <div class="tab-card-meta">Python + GitHub Actions</div>
            <div class="tab-card-title">AutoCrawler</div>
            <div class="tab-card-desc">自動化抓取上市櫃公司財報與營收數據的排程爬蟲。</div>
            <svg class="tab-card-arrow" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"></line><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"></polyline></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="projects.html" class="tab-card">
            <div class="tab-card-meta">Quarto + SCSS</div>
            <div class="tab-card-title">個人網站</div>
            <div class="tab-card-desc">使用 Quarto 打造的靜態研究筆記與作品集網站。</div>
            <svg class="tab-card-arrow" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"></line><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"></polyline></svg>
        </a>
    </div>
</div>

<div id="tab-data" class="tab-pane">
    <div class="tab-cards">
        <a href="data.html" class="tab-card">
            <div class="tab-card-meta">CSV · 250MB</div>
            <div class="tab-card-title">台股日頻交易數據</div>
            <div class="tab-card-desc">涵蓋近十年上市櫃個股的 OHLCV 與籌碼資料。</div>
            <svg class="tab-card-arrow" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"></line><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"></polyline></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="data.html" class="tab-card">
            <div class="tab-card-meta">Parquet · 更新至 2025 Q3</div>
            <div class="tab-card-title">基本面財務季報</div>
            <div class="tab-card-desc">上市櫃公司季度財務指標彙整，含 ROE、EPS 等關鍵欄位。</div>
            <svg class="tab-card-arrow" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"></line><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"></polyline></svg>
        </a>
        <a href="data.html" class="tab-card">
            <div class="tab-card-meta">CSV · 每日更新</div>
            <div class="tab-card-title">法人買賣超統計</div>
            <div class="tab-card-desc">三大法人每日買賣超金額與張數，支援歷史回溯查詢。</div>
            <svg class="tab-card-arrow" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><line x1="7" y1="17" x2="17" y2="7"></line><polyline points="7 7 17 7 17 17"></polyline></svg>
        </a>
    </div>
</div>
-->

<script>
function showTab(tabId, event) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-pane').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
    document.querySelectorAll('.tab-btn').forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
    document.getElementById('tab-' + tabId).classList.add('active');
    event.currentTarget.classList.add('active');
}
</script>
```

</div>
